releaseNotes:
• Fix: tapping History or Favorites with Safe mode enabled no longer crashes with a SQL syntax error — the ORDER BY clause was incorrectly placed before the Safe mode AND conditions.
• Search results are now sorted — favorites first, then recently watched, then alphabetical. This order is consistent across FTS, LIKE Scan, and In-Memory search.
• Stream Scanner results now persist across app restarts. A previously validated channel (green indicator) will still show as validated after relaunching the app, and survives source refresh.
• Settings → Reset: new "Clear stream validation" option resets all scan results so channels appear unvalidated until rescanned.
• Settings → Content: "Default view" setting moved into the Content section where it logically belongs.
